  - Tests, vet, and golangci-lint all pass locally.

## Test plan

<!-- Tick the checks you ran. -->

- [ ] `go test ./... -race`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `golangci-lint run`
- [ ] Smoke-tested the relevant example via stdio (initialize + tools/list)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Updated README / ARCHITECTURE if behaviour changed
